function.name: _company_member_update
function.description: Update an existing company member's information such as roles, departments, and leaders.

accountId.description: Account ID of the member to update (required).

leaderIdList.description: List of leader account IDs for this member.

roleIdList.description: List of role IDs to assign to this member.

departmentIdList.description: List of department IDs this member belongs to.

rowNumber.description: Display order number. Lower numbers appear first.
